I have created a sample content plan for my Client called GA. I also did keyword research for them. As they are already ranking for keywords i decided to opimize the keyword thats ranking from 1 to 15 position. I took this data from SEMrush. Below you can find both the content plan and keyword research. I want you to change or adjust my content plan according to my keyword research. I will provide you season and market data so that you can prirotize. The top selling products for my client GA is rosette, ribbons and then trophies and medals.


Season and market data:
Spring and Summer: This period is highlighted as key for the company, with sales starting to ramp up in April and peaking during May, June, July, and August. These months are crucial because most of the events that the company caters to, such as equestrian events, dog shows, and fairs/livestock events, are outdoor activities that occur more frequently in warmer weather.

3-month Content Plan for GA:

 Month 1: Spotlight on Equestrian Awards
On-Page SEO:
1. Meta Tags Optimization: Refine meta titles and descriptions targeting ‘equestrian awards’ and ‘horse show prizes’ with compelling calls-to-action and strategic keyword placement.
2. Update H1 and H2 Tags: Audit and optimize headers on essential product pages to include targeted keywords like ‘horse medals’ and ‘custom horse show awards’, bolstering SEO relevancy and hierarchy.
3. Internal Linking Structure: Enhance site navigability and spread link equity by implementing a strategic internal linking plan that connects ‘rosette award ribbons’, ‘horse show back numbers’, and other relevant content.
4. Update Image Alt-Text: Revise alt-text descriptions for equestrian-related images to include specific keywords, improving image search visibility and aligning with web accessibility standards.
Content Creation:
1. Blog Post: “5 Must-Have Equestrian Awards for 2024 Season” – A deep dive into the latest trends in equestrian awards, featuring ‘horse ribbon’, ‘custom horse show ribbons’, and ‘horse show banners’.
2. Buying Guide: “Equestrian Awards Buying Guide: From Rosettes to Ribbons” – Targeting ‘horse medals’, ‘horse show rosettes’, and ‘ribbon horse’.
3. Infographics: “The Anatomy of a Perfect Horse Show Award” – Sharing across platforms, highlighting popular items (‘horse trophy’, ‘horse medals’).
Backlink Strategy:
- Guest Posting: Partner with equestrian blogs for guest posts on “Trends in Equestrian Awards” linking back to the equestrian collection page.
- Equestrian Forums & Communities Engagement: Participate in discussions and share insights on award trends, subtly linking back to relevant blog posts.
Social Media Content:
- Pinterest: Pins showcasing ‘horse show awards’ and linking to the buying guide; boards that curate imagery of products in action at events.
- YouTube: Upload customer testimonial videos, guiding future customers on selecting awards for equestrian events.

 
 
Month 2: Focus on Dog Show Awards
On-Page SEO:
1. Product and Category Page Enhancements: Strengthen on-page content for ‘dog show trophies’ and ‘dog ribbons’ listings by weaving in high-value keywords, improving product descriptions, and enhancing category page content for better search engine indexing.
2. Blog Post and Top Products Optimization: Develop and optimize content within key blog posts and top product pages, focusing specifically on ‘dog show rosettes’ and ‘best in show trophy’, to drive search relevance and user engagement.
3. Internal Linking Structure: Continue to amplify the site’s internal linking strategy by linking related dog show content to pertinent product pages, thereby facilitating a smoother user experience and supporting SEO efforts.
Content Creation:
1. Blog Post: “Ultimate Awards for Dog Shows 2024” – Keywords include ‘dog show trophies’, ‘dog ribbons’, and ‘dog show rosettes’.
2. Interviews: Collaborate with dog show winners, discussing the emotional value of winning awards like ‘dog trophy’ and ‘championship ribbons’.
3. Event Guides: “How to Choose Awards for Your Dog Show” – Leveraging ‘custom dog show awards’ and ‘dog show trophy ideas’.
Backlink Strategy:
- Dog Show Organizers: Reach out for collaboration opportunities on their platforms, offering expertise or featured articles on choosing show awards.
- Pet Industry Influencers: Secure backlinks through interviews or features discussing ga Company’s uniqueness.
Social Media Content:
- LinkedIn: Share industry-related articles and original posts discussing trends in dog show awards, featuring products.
- Pinterest: Create boards for ‘Dog Show Preparation’ with visuals of ‘dog show rosettes’ and ‘dog trophies’.

 Month 3: Highlighting Fairs and 4-H Awards
On-Page SEO:
1. Conversion Optimization: Optimize conversion pathways on pages like ‘4-H awards’ and ‘fair ribbons’ through compelling CTAs, streamlined navigation, and engaging visuals, aiming to turn visitors into customers.
2. Schema Markup Enhancement: Integrate advanced schema markup across fair and 4-H award pages to ensure rich snippets are effectively displayed in search results, enhancing visibility and CTR.
Content Creation:
1. Blog Post: “The Complete Guide to Choosing Fairs and 4-H Awards” – Highlight ‘fair ribbons’, ‘4-H gifts’, and ‘fair banner’, emphasizing the quality and range of products offered.
2. Success Stories: Publish customer stories featuring ‘year-end horse show awards’ and ‘perpetual trophies’, showcasing the impact of recognition on winners.
3. Tips & Tricks: “How to Display Your Fair and 4-H Awards” – Creating engaging content around ‘fair ribbon display’ and ‘award sashes’, providing value to past and potential customers.
Backlink Strategy:
- Collaborate with 4-H clubs and agricultural organizations for content sharing, securing backlinks from their newsletters and websites.
- Write guest posts for agriculture and event planning websites, focusing on award selection tips and trends, and linking back to the Ga Company’s relevant landing pages.
Social Media Content:
- Instagram: Share high-quality images of ‘4-H ribbons’ and ‘fair banners’ in use, using hashtags related to fairs and livestock shows to increase visibility.
- YouTube: Create “How It’s Made” videos showcasing the making of ‘custom ribbons for name tags’ and ‘rosettes for sale’, linking back to product pages.
- LinkedIn: Post articles about the importance of awards in community and youth development, highlighting ‘4-H awards’ and ‘perpetual trophies’.

Month 1: Spotlight on Equestrian Awards (Target keyword: horse show ribbons)
On-Page SEO:
1. Update Meta Tags: Optimize meta titles and descriptions to target high-volume keyword "horse show ribbons" for improved visibility.
2. H1 and H2 Tags: Incorporate targeted keywords like ‘horse ribbons’ and ‘best in show ribbons’ in headers for SEO relevancy.
3. Internal Linking: Link relevant content to ‘horse show ribbons’ product pages to enhance site structure and SEO value.
4. Image Alt-Text: Update alt-text descriptions to include specific keywords related to equestrian awards and ribbons.
Content Creation:
1. Blog Post: “The Top Horse Show Ribbons for the 2024 Season” – Highlighting the best-in-class ribbons for equestrian events.
2. Buying Guide: “Choosing the Perfect Horse Show Ribbons for Spring and Summer Events” – Guiding customers in selecting the right ribbons.
3. Infographics: “Visual Guide to Horse Show Ribbons” – Visual representation of different ribbons available for equestrian events.
Backlink Strategy:
- Partner with equestrian blogs to create guest posts on "Trending Horse Show Ribbons" linking back to relevant product pages.
- Engage with equestrian forums and communities to share insights on the importance of horse show ribbons, driving traffic to the site.
Social Media Content:

- YouTube: Upload videos featuring the usage and benefits of different horse show ribbons to attract potential customers.

Month 2: Focus on Dog Show Awards (Target keyword: dog show trophies)
On-Page SEO:
1. Product Page Optimization: Enhance content for ‘dog show trophies’ by integrating targeted keywords and improving product descriptions for better search ranking.
2. Blog Post Optimization: Update blog posts related to ‘dog show rosettes’ and ‘dog trophies’ to increase search visibility.
3. Internal Linking: Implement a strategic internal linking plan to connect dog show content for improved site structure.
Content Creation:
1. Blog Post: “Best Dog Show Trophies for Spring and Summer Competitions” – Featuring top dog show trophies available for the season.
2. Customer Interviews: Share stories of dog show winners and their experiences with winning trophies and ribbons on social media.
3. Event Guides: “Selecting the Right Dog Show Trophies for Warm-Weather Events” – Providing guidance on choosing the perfect trophies.
Backlink Strategy:
- Collaborate with dog show organizers to feature Ga Company’s products on their platforms, building backlinks for SEO value.
- Reach out to pet industry influencers for guest posts or features to create quality backlinks and increase brand visibility.
Social Media Content:
- LinkedIn: Share industry-related insights on dog show awards and trophies to engage with professionals in the field.
- Pinterest: Create boards dedicated to showcasing dog show trophies and ribbons for increased exposure.

Month 3: Highlighting Fairs and 4-H Awards (Target keyword: fair ribbons)
On-Page SEO:
1. Conversion Path Optimization: Enhance conversion pathways on ‘4-H awards’ and ‘fair ribbons’ pages to drive customer engagement and conversions.
2. Schema Markup: Implement schema markup for fair and 4-H award pages to boost visibility in search results and attract more clicks.
Content Creation:
1. Blog Post: “Choosing the Perfect Fair Ribbons and 4-H Awards for Spring and Summer Events” – Highlighting the range of products available.
2. Customer Success Stories: Showcase testimonials from customers who have used Ga Company’s fair ribbons and 4-H awards.
3. Tips & Tricks: “Displaying Your Fair and 4-H Awards for Maximum Impact” – Providing visual guides and display ideas for customers.
Backlink Strategy:
- Partner with 4-H clubs and agricultural organizations for content collaboration and backlink opportunities to improve domain authority.
- Write guest posts for relevant agriculture and event planning websites, focusing on 4-H award selection tips, and linking back to Ga Company’s products.
Social Media Content:
- Instagram: Share visually appealing posts featuring fair ribbons and 4-H awards to attract a wider audience.
- YouTube: Create engaging videos showcasing the process of creating custom ribbons and rosettes, linking back to product pages for conversions.
- LinkedIn: Share articles discussing the significance of awards in community development, emphasizing 4-H awards and perpetual trophies.

Month 1: Product Spotlight on Rosettes and Ribbons
On-Page SEO:
1. Update Meta Tags: Optimize meta titles and descriptions to target keywords like "custom rosette ribbons" for improved visibility.
2. H1 and H2 Tags: Incorporate targeted keywords related to rosettes and ribbons on product pages for SEO relevancy.
3. Internal Linking: Link relevant content to specific product pages, such as custom rosette ribbons, to enhance site structure and SEO value.
4. Image Alt-Text: Update alt-text descriptions to include keywords related to rosettes, ribbons, trophies, and medals for better search visibility.
Content Creation:
1. Blog Post: “The Beauty of Custom Rosette Ribbons: A Showcase of Elegance and Quality” – Highlighting the craftsmanship and customization options available.
2. Buying Guide: “Choosing the Perfect Ribbons and Rosettes for Your Events” – Guiding customers in selecting the right products for their specific needs.
3. Product Showcase: “Spotlight on Trophies and Medals: Celebrate Success with Ga Company” – Featuring the top-selling trophies and medals available.
Backlink Strategy:
- Collaborate with industry partners and influencers to create guest posts and features on the uniqueness of custom rosette ribbons and Ga Company's products.
- Engage with relevant blogs and forums to share insights and expertise on rosettes, ribbons, trophies, and medals, driving traffic to the site.
Social Media Content:
- Pinterest: Create boards highlighting the beauty of custom rosette ribbons, trophies, and medals to engage with the audience.
- Instagram: Share visually appealing images of rosettes, ribbons, trophies, and medals to showcase the product diversity and quality.

Month 2: Focus on Custom Trophies and Awards
On-Page SEO:
1. Product Page Optimization: Enhance content for custom trophies and awards by integrating targeted keywords and improving product descriptions for better search visibility.
2. Blog Post Optimization: Update blog posts related to trophy customization, award ceremonies, and recognition programs to increase search ranking.
3. Internal Linking: Implement a strategic internal linking plan to connect custom trophy content across relevant pages for improved site structure.
Content Creation:
1. Blog Post: “The Art of Custom Trophies: Personalized Awards for Every Occasion” – Featuring the customization options and specializations available.
2. Testimonials & Case Studies: Showcase stories and feedback from customers who have used Ga Company’s custom trophies and awards.
3. Recognition Guide: “Celebrating Excellence: The Importance of Custom Awards in Every Event” – Providing insights and tips on choosing the right awards.
Backlink Strategy:
- Partner with event organizers, businesses, and influencers to promote custom trophies and awards, creating backlinks for improved SEO.
- Collaborate with industry publications and forums to share content on the significance of personalized awards, building authority and credibility.
Social Media Content:
- LinkedIn: Share industry-related insights on the impact of custom trophies and awards in employee recognition and event ceremonies.
- Pinterest: Create boards dedicated to showcasing the customization options and designs of custom trophies and awards to attract a diverse audience.

Month 3: Product Showcasing and Brand Recognition
On-Page SEO:
1. Conversion Path Optimization: Enhance conversion pathways on product pages for rosettes, ribbons, trophies, and medals to drive customer engagement and conversions.
2. Schema Markup: Implement schema markup for product pages to improve visibility in search results and attract more clicks.
Content Creation:
1. Product Features & Benefits: Highlight the unique features and benefits of rosettes, ribbons, trophies, and medals in different blog posts and guides.
2. Design Showcase: “The Artistry of Ga Company: Exquisite Rosettes, Ribbons, Trophies, and Medals” – Showcasing the craftsmanship and design elements.
3. Celebration Stories: Share stories of customers and events where Ga Company’s products have added value and significance.
Backlink Strategy:
- Collaborate with brand partners and affiliates to promote Ga Company’s products, creating backlinks and expanding reach.
- Engage with lifestyle and event planning blogs to share insights and product showcases, building credibility and brand awareness.
Social Media Content:
- Instagram: Share behind-the-scenes glimpses of the design process and production of rosettes, ribbons, trophies, and medals.
- YouTube: Create video tutorials and showcases of Ga Company’s products, engaging with a wider audience and driving traffic to the site.

Ok this is good. I like first month plan as you are focusing on product instead of market. Leave first month as it is. Rewrite second month. In the second month focus on markets instead of products. The market is Equestrian Awards, dog show, Fairs and 4h awards.

Month 2: Market Focus on Equestrian Awards, Dog Shows, Fairs, and 4-H Awards
On-Page SEO:
1. Product and Category Page Enhancements: Strengthen on-page content for Equestrian Awards, Dog Show Awards, Fairs, and 4-H Awards listings by integrating relevant keywords and optimizing product descriptions to improve search engine indexing.
2. Blog Post and Top Products Optimization: Develop and optimize content within key blog posts and top product pages related to Equestrian Awards, Dog Show Awards, Fairs, and 4-H Awards, emphasizing specific events and seasons.
3. Internal Linking Structure: Enhance the internal linking strategy by connecting relevant content across Equestrian Awards, Dog Show Awards, Fairs, and 4-H Awards categories to improve site navigation and SEO value.
Content Creation:
